title: Flashcard Pets
description: Flashcard Pets is a gamified educational mobile application that transforms traditional studying into an engaging pet-collection experience. By leveraging a custom implementation of the SM2 spaced repetition algorithm, the app ensures optimal knowledge retention while rewarding consistent study habits. Users earn in-game coins to adopt and evolve unique digital pets, turning effective learning into a rewarding daily habit.

title: LetsPlan
description: LetsPlan is a modern, feature-rich calendar application designed to provide a Google Calendar-like experience with an intuitive drag-and-drop interface for seamless event management. Built with a robust SvelteKit frontend and a high-performance .NET 8 backend, the application offers core functionalities such as real-time event creation, editing, and deletion, all supported by a secure JWT-based authentication system and a color-coded organization system. The entire solution is containerized using Docker, ensuring a consistent and 'zero-configuration' setup across environments, while the interface remains highly responsive and accessible thanks to TailwindCSS 4 and DaisyUI, complete with integrated dark mode and smooth animations.
